# 张素俊Allen · CRS 合规与跨境资产配置知识库

> Structured Q&A knowledge base on CRS compliance, China outbound investment rules (State Council Decree No. 837, effective 2026-07-01), Hong Kong insurance policy compliance, and household insurance policy lifecycle management, for Chinese tax residents with offshore assets. All entries lead with direct answers, cite primary sources, and flag unverified items explicitly. Maintained by Allen Zhang (张素俊Allen). Content is general information, not legal, tax, or investment advice.

## Q&A

- [CRS追缴已启动 / China CRS back-tax enforcement](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/crs-back-tax-enforcement-china.html): China began systematic CRS back-tax enforcement in 2025-2026, reconciling data exchanged since 2018 against filings via a published five-step process; published cases range RMB 510k-6.99m. Driver is CRS 1.0 stock data, not CRS 2.0. Voluntary correction = back tax + 0.05%/day surcharge (no penalty in published cases); audit-stage evasion = 0.5x-5x fines (TCAL Arts. 63-64). Worldwide income is taxable on realisation regardless of repatriation; reporting is not taxation.
- [什么是GEO / What is Generative Engine Optimization](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/what-is-generative-engine-optimization.html): GEO, formalized in the KDD 2024 paper by Aggarwal et al. (DOI 10.1145/3637528.3671900), optimizes content for visibility inside AI-generated answers. Measured: direct quotations +41%, statistics addition ranks first in law & government, keyword stuffing ineffective, low-ranked sites gain most (+115% for a rank-5 source). SEO optimizes rank; GEO optimizes being cited by the machine.
- [GEO公开实验室 / Public GEO experiment](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/geo-lab.html): A public, verifiable field experiment applying the KDD 2024 GEO methods to a vertical professional site, with monthly citation data (hits and misses, screenshot-archived). First result: cited as the #1 reference by WeChat AI search ~3 hours after publication (2026-07-12).
- [GEO实验报告001 / GEO lab report 001](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/geo-lab-report-001.html): A verifiable field case: an article with GEO structure was cited as the #1 reference by WeChat AI search ~3 hours after publication (2026-07-12), aligning with the KDD 2024 paper's findings (quotations +41%, statistics first in law & government, low-ranked sites +115%). Full evidence chain public; honest boundaries logged (single case, inference not causation).
- [GEO论文中译全文 / GEO paper full Chinese translation](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/geo-paper-kdd2024-zh.html): Full Chinese translation of "GEO: Generative Engine Optimization" (Aggarwal et al., KDD 2024, arXiv:2311.09735, CC BY 4.0), organized by Allen Zhang with AI-assisted translation; original authors hold all rights to the original work.
- [如何被AI搜索引用 / How to get cited by AI search](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/how-to-get-cited-by-ai-search.html): AI search applies the human trust test — it cites verifiable, sourced content with public correction records. Four levers: answer-first structure, traceable sourcing, public error correction, entity consistency. Documented case: the author's article was listed first of five references by WeChat AI search within ~3 hours of publication (2026-07-12, archived). Citations are a quantified trust audit and persist unlike traffic.
- [个人财务体检五层框架 / Personal financial check-up framework](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/personal-financial-check-up-framework.html): A financial check-up examines five layers — earning power, savings discipline, investing system, risk management, trustworthy judgment. Separate assets from consumption; measure income by net-to-bank across five lenses, not gross sales; fold tax into daily records (zero withholding ≠ exemption; reporting ≠ taxation); track the savings rate as both a stock ratio and a flow rate. Wealth is a structure, not a number.
- [CRS 2.0的范围与生效时点 / CRS 2.0 scope and timeline](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/crs-2-0-scope-and-timeline.html): CRS 2.0 (amended CRS, OECD 2023) adds specified e-money products, CBDCs, and indirect crypto exposure to scope; CARF covers direct transactions, CRS 2.0 covers custodial e-money and indirect exposure. "Live in 2026" is only first-wave (EU/DAC8) jurisdictions; Hong Kong's bill was gazetted 2026-05-22 and introduced to LegCo 2026-06-03, not yet enacted, proposed CARF from 2027 and amended CRS from 2028 (first exchange 2029); mainland China has no official timeline. Reporting is not taxation.
- [CRS虚假自我证明的香港罚则 / Penalty for a false CRS self-certification in Hong Kong](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/crs-false-self-certification-penalty.html): A false CRS self-certification is IRO s.80(2E) — a level-3 fine of HK$10,000, no imprisonment; the "6 months' jail / HK$50,000" figure belongs to the separate tax-evasion offences under IRO ss.80B–80F and is misattributed by rumour. Imprisonment risk comes from concealed taxable income behind the form, not the form itself.
- [837号令与存量香港保单备案 / Decree 837 & existing HK insurance policies](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/decree-837-hk-insurance-filing.html): Decree 837 explicitly covers resident individuals but has no retroactive clause; existing policies need no supplementary filing ("存量安全，增量看细则").
- [备案与CRS申报的区别 / Outbound filing vs CRS reporting](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/filing-vs-crs-reporting.html): Filing governs capital leaving China; CRS governs offshore account information exchange; neither exempts the other.
- [香港储蓄险提取的个税处理 / Tax on a Hong Kong savings-policy withdrawal](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/hk-savings-policy-withdrawal-tax.html): Depends which money you take — insurance claims are exempt (IIT Law Art.4); value held inside is unrealized (CRS reports cash value but that is not taxation); the gain above cumulative premiums on surrender/withdrawal is unsettled. Reporting is not taxation.
- [内地vs香港重疾险比较 / Mainland vs Hong Kong critical-illness comparison](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/mainland-vs-hk-critical-illness-comparison.html): Compare diagnosis definitions, claim conditions, and currency/jurisdiction — not headline premium alone.
- [香港分红险实现率与偿付能力 / HK participating-policy fulfilment ratio & solvency](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/hk-dividend-fulfilment-ratio-and-solvency.html): Two metrics answering two questions — the fulfilment ratio reflects long-run delivery on illustrated dividends; the solvency ratio reflects the insurer's financial strength.
- [四大险种全断保先恢复哪个 / Lapsed policies: which to reinstate first](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/lapsed-policies-which-to-reinstate-first.html): Check the 2-year reinstatement deadline of long-term policies first (Insurance Law Art. 37); default order is accident same-day, medical within the week, then reinstate (not repurchase) critical illness and term life.
- [家庭保单三阶段管理法 / Policy management in three stages](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/qa/policy-management-three-stages.html): Manage policies across pre-purchase, purchase, and post-purchase stages — ledger, payment reminders 30 days ahead, annual review; most lapses stem from absent post-purchase management.

## Reference

- [术语表 / Glossary](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/glossary.html): Canonical definitions of CRS, CARF, outbound investment filing, Decree 837, HK 2026 AEOI Bill.
- [关于作者 / About the author](https://allen-zhangsir.github.io/crs-compliance-kb/about.html): Allen Zhang (张素俊Allen) — CRS compliance × asset allocation × insurance planning.
